message:
chore: add agent session ephemeral file patterns to .gitignore

Add patterns for common agent-generated ephemeral files that should
never be committed: SESSION_TODO.md, SESSION_REPORT.md, verify_*.sh,
newfile.txt, repro_*.rs. Also add ci-artifacts/, proptest-regressions/,
test_meminfo, crates/*/target/, .agent-mail.yaml, .beads/.br_history/,
and .claude/settings.local.json patterns.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -38,3 +38,28 @@ a.out
 
 # Optimization artifacts (agent-generated)
 artifacts/
+
+# Ephemeral files (agent-generated, build artifacts, test detritus)
+ci-artifacts/
+proptest-regressions/
+test_meminfo
+
+# Agent session ephemeral files
+SESSION_TODO.md
+SESSION_REPORT.md
+SESSION_*.md
+verify_*.sh
+newfile.txt
+repro_*.rs
+
+# Nested crate build artifacts
+crates/*/target/
+
+# Agent coordination config
+.agent-mail.yaml
+
+# Beads history snapshots
+.beads/.br_history/
+
+# Claude local settings
+.claude/settings.local.json
